label: nr5-live107-v3-sweep-7220khz
recommendations: AGC gain moved more than 12 dB during the trace; run the agc-level-step fixture and listen for pumping before tuning NR.
RX audio leveler peak headroom limited one or more samples; compare leveler peak headroom with final audio peak before increasing loudness target.
liveRecommendedActions: Capture a G2 live benchmark run and compare against the offline fixture baseline before changing any default.
